arts.ttl: Reece Cole injury latest as Exeter City midfielder faces absence
arts.sum: But I think there’s a whole different things that go into getting the players refocused and getting them ready to bring energy and to bring everything they can to win the game on Saturday.” “He picked up a niggle in his calf pre-season as well and these things can happen in football and you just don’t get your season going,” Caldwell said.

arts.ttl: Preview: Exeter City vs. Cambridge United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League One clash between Exeter City and Cambridge United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Exeter City already want to make Johnly Yfeko's loan permanent
arts.sum: EXETER City manager Gary Caldwell says that things are in place to turn Johnly Yfeko’s loan deal into something permanent with the young Rangers defender catching the eye in League One this season. “Johnly is a young player with a huge future and if we could tie him down to be a permanent player at this club, then I think it would be a brilliant thing to do,” he said.
